title: AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CANDON, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 6676 / 65 OG No. 8, 1789 (February 24, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4965, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT PROVIDING FOR THE ESTABLISHMENT OF AN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CANDON, PROVINCE OF ILOCOS SUR, AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established, under the direct supervision of the Director of Medical Services, an emergency hospital in the Municipality of Candon, Province of Ilocos Sur, to be known as Candon Emergency Hospital.

SEC. 2. The sum of two hundred thousand pesos is hereby appropriated out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the establishment, operation and maintenance of said hospital during the fiscal year nineteen hundred sixty-seven. Thereafter, such sum as may be needed, for its operation and maintenance shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
